changesSummary: This PR updates the `gomega` dependency to v1.42.1, introduces new matchers (`BeASlice`, `BeAnArray`), and adds a plugin system for Claude Code skills. It also includes significant internal refactoring to improve robustness, such as cycle detection in formatting and iteration limits in PKCS#12 decryption. Finally, it implements request pipelining for the SSH agent client to improve concurrency.
